g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the wallpaper drive all colors in the system?')
sendPrompt('What does matugen generate from the wallpaper?')
sendPrompt('How does waybar style.css import matugen colors?')
sendPrompt('How does gtk.css import matugen colors?')
sendPrompt('How does kitty.conf include matugen colors?')
sendPrompt('How does hyprland.conf source matugen colors for borders?')
sendPrompt('What shell apps get themed by waybar colors?')
sendPrompt('Which GTK apps get the matugen palette?')
sendPrompt('How does Kitty use the matugen color palette?')
sendPrompt('How do Hyprland window borders get their color?')
sendPrompt('How does Hyprland composite all these themed layers onto the screen?')
